items.question: What is Project?
items.answer: Project is a sample product used to show how the FAQ accordion looks. You can replace this text with the real answer coming from your API.

items.question: How can I integrate the API?
items.answer: Call your API endpoint (for example /faq) and map the received data into the same shape used here (question + answer).

items.question: Can I customize the styles?
items.answer: Yes — the component is built with Tailwind. Tweak colors, spacing, and the SVG brush under the title to fit your design.

items.question: Is this accessible?
items.answer: Buttons are keyboard-focusable and announce expansion state with aria-expanded. You can improve further by managing focus on open/close.
